item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: Mochi - The Bitcoin-native creator platform. Subscriptions, digital products, and exclusive content — all paid in sats. https://mochi-pay.com/

item.title: Crypto Clarity Act still at mercy of ethics section as Democrats balk at Trump deal
Crypto Rallies as Reported Ethics Deal Revives Odds of CLARITY Act Senate Vote
item.description: Bitcoin reclaimed $66,000 after reports that the White House circulated agreed-upon ethics-provision language to Senate Republicans, removing the main obstacle to a floor vote before the August recess.

item.title: S&P and Pantera Launch Revenue-Screened Digital Asset Index
item.description: The 18-constituent benchmark excludes Bitcoin and meme coins, screening for protocols with positive revenue verified by onchain data.

item.title: Movement Labs Files for Chapter 11 Bankruptcy
item.description: The company behind the MOVE token filed a voluntary petition in Delaware listing up to $10 million in liabilities, capping a year of governance disputes, a market-making scandal and a failed strategic pivot.

item.title: Pavel Durov Wants to Give a Billion Telegram Users a Crypto Wallet
item.description: The promise of instant, zero-fee crypto transactions for over a billion Telegram users sent its native Gram token up 7%.

item.title: Bitcoin rally faces key test at $68,000 as 'summer slumber' grips crypto, analysts say

Movement Labs Files for Chapter 11 Bankruptcy With Liabilities Above $1 Million Movement Labs, the developer of the Movement blockchain, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection. Court filings s
item.description: pMovement Labs Files for Chapter 11 Bankruptcy With Liabilities Above $1 Millionbr /br /Movement Labs, the developer of the Movement blockchain, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection. Court filings show the company has between $100,000 and $500,000 in assets, more than $1 million in liabili

item.title: Crypto's Quiet Revolution: How Stablecoins Deliver Aid Where Banks Can't
item.description: Blockchain's most underrated and important use case: nutrition aid for mothers in Haiti and banking the unbanked in Afghanistan. Stablecoins for aid.

item.title: Crypto's Quiet Revolution: How Stablecoins Deliver Aid Where Banks Can't
item.description: Blockchain's most underrated and important use case: nutrition aid for mothers in Haiti and banking the unbanked in Afghanistan. Stablecoins for aid.

item.title: Scott notes that Bitcoin speculative activity has fallen below 2022 levels. “Speculators have pretty much exited and are no longer driving price action… I think we’ve gotten the washout in positioning
item.description: pScott notes that Bitcoin speculative activity has fallen below 2022 levels.br /br /“Speculators have pretty much exited and are no longer driving price action… I think we’ve gotten the washout in positioning now.”/pa href="https://nitter.net/Delphi_Digital/status/2079631854202740827#m"br /Videobr /

item.title: Months before Bonk DAO lost $20.5M to a governance attack, a nearly identical proposal targeted Reserve's hyUSD token: an unverified contract upgrade, no forum discussion, just enough voting power to
item.description: pMonths before Bonk DAO lost $20.5M to a governance attack, a nearly identical proposal targeted Reserve's hyUSD token: an unverified contract upgrade, no forum discussion, just enough voting power to pass. br /br /Hypernative's Onchain Monitoring & Automated Response flagged it the moment it posted

item.title: Ondo Enables Tokenized Stock Collateral on OndoPerps
item.description: Ondo Stocks holders can now back perpetual futures positions with SPYon and QQQon, subject to an initial $100,000 per-asset notional cap.

item.title: Claude's Fable 5 just solved an 87-year-old math problem, and it matters for bitcoin
Galaxy sets up $5 million fund to help shield Bitcoin against quantum computing threats

item.title: ETH Perp-Spot Volume Gap on Binance Remains Elevated Despite Z-Score Decline “This suggests that much of the recent price movement may be driven by leveraged positions rather than sustained buying fro
item.description: pETH Perp-Spot Volume Gap on Binance Remains Elevated Despite Z-Score Declinebr /br /“This suggests that much of the recent price movement may be driven by leveraged positions rather than sustained buying from long-term investors.” – By a href="https://nitter.net/ArabxChain" title="Arab Chain"@Arabx

item.title: Jack Mallers Quits Twenty One Capital as Tether's Bitcoin Merger Collapses
item.description: XXI stock dropped nearly 18% after the company's co-founder stepped down and Tether's plan to combine three Bitcoin firms officially fell apart.

item.title: Telegram Founder: Plans to Integrate Native Non-Custodial Gram Wallets for All Users This Year Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the platform plans to launch a large-scale rollout of native non-custod
item.description: pTelegram Founder: Plans to Integrate Native Non-Custodial Gram Wallets for All Users This Yearbr /br /Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the platform plans to launch a large-scale rollout of native non-custodial Gram wallets across every Telegram app this summer, enabling instant, zero-fee crypto tr

item.title: Morpho Launches Fixed-Rate Lending Protocol Midnight on Base
item.description: The DeFi lender also released a new Markets App that lets users set their own rates and terms, starting on Base with more networks to follow.

item.title: Jack Mallers Steps Down as CEO of Twenty One Capital
item.description: Board member Raphael Zagury takes over the Tether-backed bitcoin treasury company, and Strike is no longer under consideration for a business combination.

item.title: Russia’s parliament passes crypto market law with $3,800 annual cap for retail investors

Whales Swallow Bitcoin During Price Drop “While the price of Bitcoin remains almost 50% below its peak, wallets holding between 1K and 10K Bitcoins have just accelerated their buying at the fastest pa
item.description: pWhales Swallow Bitcoin During Price Dropbr /br /“While the price of Bitcoin remains almost 50% below its peak, wallets holding between 1K and 10K Bitcoins have just accelerated their buying at the fastest pace in months.” – By a href="https://nitter.net/caueconomy" title="Cauê Oliveira"@caueconomy/
